name: ALEXANDER, GOVERNOR OF TENNESSEE, et al. v. CHOATE et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in ALEXANDER, GOVERNOR OF TENNESSEE, et al. v. CHOATE et al. (469 U.S. 287, 1984 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
